service.name: SendGrid API (Twilio)
service.description_for_ai: Email delivery API trusted by 80,000+ companies. Send transactional and marketing emails. 100 emails/day free. High deliverability, analytics, templates. Use for sending emails programmatically.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send transactional email via SendGrid with high deliverability. Supports HTML content, templates, attachments, and open/click tracking.

from.note: See description for full object structure

agent_hints.sender_auth: Verify sender email or domain first: app.sendgrid.com/settings/sender_auth. Unverified senders get blocked.
agent_hints.templates: Use Dynamic Templates in SendGrid for personalized emails with Handlebars variables.
agent_hints.suppression: Bounces/unsubscribes are auto-managed. Check suppression list before re-adding: GET /v3/suppression/bounces
agent_hints.webhooks: Enable Event Webhook for delivery tracking: open, click, bounce, spam_report events.
agent_hints.from_address: Must use verified sender email or domain. Verify at https://app.sendgrid.com/settings/sender_auth
agent_hints.html: Send both text/plain and text/html versions for better deliverability.
